title: Redesign MotionHero.jsx — phosphor white + red accent particles, foreground content overlay
acceptance_criteria: Particle color generation: replace HSL cyan (0.55 hue) with phosphor white (#EAEAEA) + red accent (#E61919) mix
Particle colors: white base, some particles tinted red accent, no cyan/blue anywhere
Particle system (Three.js Points, ShaderMaterial, useFrame) kept functional
Add foreground content overlay inside MotionHero: large `KRISH` display text in Geist Extra Bold
Add subtitle: 'Security Engineer & AI Researcher' in mono uppercase
Add CTA buttons (or links) consistent with redesigned Button style
Foreground content uses CSS positioning (absolute overlay) — z-index above canvas
Update reduced-motion fallback div background: replace cyan gradient with solid #0A0A0A + red tint
Mouse interaction, scroll progress, explodeAmt, hoverIntensity kept functional
deviceTier detection and reduceMotion detection kept
pulse glow in fragment shader: change to red accent glow if kept, or remove
